metadata.title: Municipal Public Space Enforcement Deployment and Operating Surfaces
metadata.description: Primary field, cloud, mobile, and municipal integration channels used to deliver and operate the Municipal Public Space Enforcement domain.
notes: This model maps product bricks to the main channels through which they are deployed, distributed, triggered, or operated.
Products link back to this model through deploymentChannelRef and deploymentEnvironmentRef on delivery paths.

channels.description: Movable field hardware and local control surfaces deployed in public-space hotspots.
Primary fleet of movable camera and sensor units used for hotspot coverage.

environments.description: Live field deployments across instrumented public-space sites.

deployedBricks.deploymentRole: Captures field events and supporting media.
Keeps units operating in low-infrastructure settings.
Applies compliant capture boundaries at the edge.

channels.description: Secure connectivity and device health channel for live municipal deployments.

environments.description: Secure 4G/5G transport and remote fleet control.

deployedBricks.deploymentRole: Transports events and enables remote device operation.
Tracks uptime, battery, signal, and fault state across the fleet.

channels.description: Primary EU-hosted control plane for detection, evidence, workflow, and analytics.
Core SaaS runtime for detection, triage, mapping, and case workflow.

environments.description: Primary live SaaS environment hosted in the EU.

deployedBricks.deploymentRole: Processes incoming events and flags suspected incidents.
Ranks and qualifies likely actionable incidents.
Provides site-level spatial operations and hotspot views.
Runs case workflow and operator review.

channels.description: Governed evidence storage, retention, audit, and compliance surfaces.

environments.description: Secure evidence storage and governance environment.

deployedBricks.brickName: Evidence Vault and Chain of Custody
deployedBricks.deploymentRole: Stores evidence and its provenance.
Automates legal retention and deletion windows.
Packages governance artifacts and deployment controls.
Tracks access and workflow accountability.

channels.description: Primary interfaces used by municipal staff, officers, and leaders.
Main browser-based surface for operators, legal reviewers, and leaders.

environments.description: Live web application used by councils and intermunicipal authorities.

deployedBricks.deploymentRole: Provides leadership reporting and value proof.
Guides case progression through compliant workflow.
Generates sanctions and notification material.

channels.description: Field surface for officers and municipal teams working away from the desk.

environments.description: Live field workflow surface for municipal actors.

deployedBricks.deploymentRole: Supports field updates, validation, and closure.
Pushes tasks and captures field completion.

channels.description: Interfaces to finance, service management, and partner authority systems.
Integration surface for municipal ERP, CRM, treasury, and partner workflow systems.

deployedBricks.deploymentRole: Exchanges incident, case, task, and reporting data with municipal systems.
Packages and transmits evidence to partner organizations.
Synchronizes sanction and payment state with treasury workflows.
